titles.text: Fushigi no Dungeon: Fuurai no Shiren DS2 - Sabaku no Majou
不思議のダンジョン 風来のシレン DS2 砂漠の魔城

descriptions.text: Shiren the Wanderer DS2: Magic Castle of the Desert is a roguelike role-playing video game developed by Chunsoft. It is part of the Mystery Dungeon series and a Nintendo DS remake of Shiren the Wanderer GB2.
